name: flow-nexus-platform
description: Comprehensive Flow Nexus platform management - authentication, sandboxes, app deployment, payments, and challenges
capabilities: Register and authenticate users with email and password
Create and manage development sandboxes with multiple templates
Manage credits and payments with auto-refill configuration
Complete coding challenges and earn rewards
Store files with public and private bucket access
author: Flow Nexus
securitySummary: This skill contains only documentation with MCP tool definitions. No executable code exists. The static scanner misinterpreted Markdown code formatting (backticks), package name references, and documentation examples as security threats. All 207 findings are false positives - backticks are Markdown syntax, cryptographic references are package names in docs, and credential examples are placeholder values for documentation purposes only.
valueStatement: Flow Nexus provides a comprehensive cloud platform for AI development with authentication, sandbox execution, and app deployment. This skill enables complete platform management through simple MCP tool calls.
userTitle: Manage Flow Nexus cloud platform with authentication and deployment
limitations: Requires Flow Nexus account and API access
Credit system may incur costs for premium features
Sandbox execution limited by tier and available credits
Network access required for all platform operations

useCases.title: Rapid AI prototyping
useCases.description: Create isolated environments for testing AI models with pre-configured templates

useCases.title: Deploy production apps
useCases.description: Browse marketplace templates and deploy complete applications with database configuration

useCases.title: Practice coding challenges
useCases.description: Solve algorithm challenges, earn credits, and track progress on leaderboards

promptTemplates.title: Create development sandbox
promptTemplates.scenario: Need Node.js environment for API development
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a Flow Nexus sandbox with Node.js template, install express and cors packages, set up environment variables for PORT 3000 and NODE_ENV development

promptTemplates.title: Deploy from template
promptTemplates.prompt: Search for React templates in the Flow Nexus marketplace and deploy the most popular one with my API keys configured

promptTemplates.title: Complete coding challenge
promptTemplates.prompt: Find an intermediate difficulty algorithm challenge on Flow Nexus and help me solve it in JavaScript

promptTemplates.title: Monitor deployment
promptTemplates.prompt: Get real-time execution logs for my deployed application and check if there are any errors or performance issues

bestPractices: Clean up unused sandboxes regularly to save credits and avoid unnecessary charges
Use environment variables for sensitive data instead of hardcoding in sandbox code
Start with free tier templates before purchasing premium applications from marketplace
antiPatterns: Never hardcode API keys or credentials directly in sandbox code or deployment configurations
Avoid keeping sandboxes running idle as they consume credits continuously while active
Do not upload sensitive personal data to public storage buckets without encryption

faq.question: Is Flow Nexus compatible with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, Flow Nexus integrates seamlessly with Claude Code through MCP tools and provides specialized Claude Code sandbox templates

faq.question: What are the credit costs for different services?
faq.answer: Sandbox execution costs 0.5 to 5 credits per hour, swarm operations 1 to 10 credits per hour, and neural training 5 to 50 credits per job

faq.question: Can I integrate Flow Nexus with my existing CI/CD pipeline?
faq.answer: Yes, Flow Nexus provides API endpoints and webhook support for integration with GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and other CI/CD tools

faq.question: How is my data secured on Flow Nexus?
faq.answer: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Private buckets require authentication and you control access permissions for all resources

faq.question: What happens if my sandbox crashes or times out?
faq.answer: Sandboxes automatically save state before termination. You can restart from the last checkpoint or access logs to debug issues

faq.question: How does Flow Nexus compare to other cloud platforms?
faq.answer: Flow Nexus specializes in AI development workflows with integrated coding challenges, pre-configured AI templates, and gamified learning
